PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAGEN, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TGS GLOBAL PAYMENT SOLUTIONS LLC GESTAS, MADELEINE, AKA TAPIA, MADELEINE, AKA TAPIA, MADELINE, AKA PARRISH, MADELINE AKA GESTAS MADELINE, AKA TAPIA, MADELEINE AKA TAPIA, MADELINE AKA PARRISH, MADELINE AKA SINGLETON, MADILINE AKA SINGLETON, MADELINE $407.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $455.00, DEFENDANT TGS GLOBAL PAYMENT SOLUTIONS WAIVES SERVICE. (DEFENDANT MADELEYN GESTAS IS AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR GTS GLOBAL) DISMISS MADELEYN GESTAS AND ALL HER AKAS FOR $407. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE DEFENDANT ALL WORK HE CLAIMS HE PREVIOUSLY GAVE TO WHICH DEFENDANT CLAIMS NOT TO HAVE RECEIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
